notes: interactive diff supports single and split layouts

unchanged_padding.line_01: This block creates distance between diff hunks.
unchanged_padding.line_02: It keeps the sample useful for next-change navigation.
unchanged_padding.line_03: The content is intentionally boring and stable.
unchanged_padding.line_04: Side-by-side mode should still align this context.
unchanged_padding.line_05: The next change appears after this padding.
unchanged_padding.line_06: Repeated jump keys should skip directly to it.

footer.message: Diff output is still patch text when redirected.
